mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, node_type, draft_name, draft_name_key, published_name, published_name_key, sort_order, node_version, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM doc_node WHERE node_type = 'DOCUMENT' AND published_name_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{escapedKeyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
